name: build-web-apps
description: Build, debug, and harden React web apps on a single agent-browser backend: deep debugging, render performance, memory leaks, error forensics, network inspection, accessibility, and state debugging — plus migrated build skills (frontend-app-builder, react/shadcn/stripe/supabase best practices). Adapted for Claude Code from OpenAI's Codex 'Build Web Apps' plugin.
